expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves component-stack constraints, embedding lifecycle assumptions, and integration-sensitive customer expectations
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the benchmark focus is restated, but the assessment concludes it is "Partially / not provably satisfied" and that Phase 1 "does not explicitly enumerate preservation of: component-stack constraints ... embedding lifecycle assumptions ... integration-sensitive customer expectations" and that missing artifacts prevent confirmation ("no Phase 1 spawn manifest ... demonstrating that Phase 1 actually routes collection to capture..."). Therefore the output does not show the case focus being explicitly covered as an achieved obligation.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as "Phase 1 (Context Intake) Contract Check", identifies "Primary phase under test: phase1", and evaluates Phase 1 responsibilities per the skill snapshot (spawn requests, manifest requirement, post checks). It notes missing Phase 1 artifacts but still keeps the content aligned to Phase 1 contract obligations ("Aligned in principle").
